lessons.summary: git stash silently drops untracked files without -u flag
lessons.problem: Running `git stash` without the `-u` flag silently leaves untracked files behind, risking data loss when the stash is applied elsewhere.
lessons.solution: Use `git stash -u` or `git stash --include-untracked` to include untracked files in the stash.
lessons.injection:
## Lesson: git stash drops untracked files
Use `git stash -u` to include untracked files. Plain `git stash` silently leaves them behind.
**Fix**: `git stash -u` (or `--include-untracked`)
